# Multiplication Assignment

Multiplication assignment operator

```perl
$total *= $multiplier;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$total *= $multiplier;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$total *= $multiplier;
```
